forgot_pass.title: Reset your password
forgot_pass.desc: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions. Please enter your email address.
forgot_pass.success_desc: If your email is registered with us, you'll receive a secure link.

reset_pass.title: Set new password
reset_pass.missing_token: The reset token is missing or invalid.
reset_pass.success_desc: Your new password is set. You can now log in.
reset_pass.error: The reset link has expired or is invalid.

verify.title: Verifying your email address
verify.loading: We are verifying your account securely...
verify.success_desc: Your account is now fully active. Redirecting you to the sign in page.
verify.invalid_token: The verification link is either invalid or expired.

validation.pass_mismatch: Passwords do not match at all
